prompt: My Axum app already uses utoipa to generate an openapi.json and orval to generate a TypeScript client from it. I want to add yauth for authentication but I don't want to break my existing client generation pipeline. How should I set this up? I also need my app's API calls to automatically carry the session cookie.

assertions.text: Recommends keeping yauth's OpenAPI spec separate from the app's spec
Shows how to use @yackey-labs/yauth-client alongside the app's orval-generated client
Explains that credentials: include on fetch requests automatically carries the session cookie
Does NOT suggest merging yauth routes into the app's openapi.json
Mentions that both clients coexist since yauth routes are under /api/auth
